message:
chore: Whitelist Lib/ in gitignore and track stdlib implementations

- Add !packages/runtime/src/Lib/ to .gitignore whitelist
- Track all stdlib .zig files (previously blocked by lib/ rule)
- Includes restored real implementations: base64, calendar, hashlib, math, pickle, typing

files.patch:
@@ -133,6 +133,7 @@ packages/**/bin/accuracy_*
 !packages/**/*.py
 !packages/**/*.sh
 !packages/**/*.zig
+!packages/runtime/src/Lib/
 !packages/**/*.go
 !packages/**/*.rs
 !packages/**/*.js
